Status.title: Breast cancer status
Status.description: Coded 1 if the participant was diagnosed with breast cancer (invasive or in situ) prior to cohort enrollment (prevalent breast cancer) or diagnosed over cohort follow-up; otherwise 0.
Status.$comment: Source coding: 0 - non-breast cancer case; 1 - case. No missing code defined in source. Variable name is capitalised ('Status') in the dictionary.
